**Gruppenbach** is a river of [Baden-Württemberg](/wiki/Baden-W%C3%BCrttemberg "Baden-Württemberg"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It is a right tributary of the [Schozach](/wiki/Schozach "Schozach") at [Auenstein](/w/index.php?title=Auenstein,_Germany&action=edit&redlink=1 "Auenstein, Germany (page does not exist)"), a part of the municipality of [Ilsfeld](/wiki/Ilsfeld "Ilsfeld").[[1]](#cite_note-1)
